data.name: orange lotus
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to “Orange Lotus”!
踏入奢華、神秘與慾望的世界，在這款成人主題的生活模擬遊戲中體驗極致。成人主題生活模擬遊戲，背景設定在奢華、秘密與慾望的世界。

你剛創建了一個曖昧的陪伴機構——The Orange Lotus。

由你來恢復它的聲譽、管理員工，並做出塑造機構及與周圍人關係的決策。

  • 管理模擬：監督機構的日常運營，管理資源、員工表現及客戶滿意度。

  • 視覺小說敘事：以故事為導向的進程，包括關係和事件。

  • 成人內容：成人場景與主題融入角色互動與故事中。

  • 獨特角色：遇見並互動各具個性、動機和秘密的角色。

Emma 🤝🔥 — 可靠的朋友與機構共同創辦人。聰明、自信，總是在需要冒險決策時出現。你們的合作迅速發展成更私人化的關係，工作與激情緊密交織。

Sofia 🕊️💔 — 一個夢想擺脫嚴格父母控制的女孩。固執、多情，渴望自由。你成為她通向獨立之路的支持者——也是引領她體驗成人世界的人。

Leah 📚🌸 — 一名非常害羞的學生，迫切需要錢去海外留學。安靜、溫柔且缺乏自信。你逐步幫助她打開心扉，建立對自己欲望的信心。

Roxy ⚡🖤 — 一個為腎上腺素與刺激而活的叛逆者。厭惡日常，總尋求新的極限。與你在一起，她更進一步，挑戰允許與危險的界限。

Vanessa 💄🔥 — 一位經驗豐富、奔放的女性，脾氣火爆。她清楚自己想要什麼，從不輕易否定自己。你們的見面是基於相互吸引的誠實交易，無幻想。

Luna 🌙🕶️ — 一個陰鬱孤僻的女孩，過著夜生活。她避開光與情感，偏愛寂靜與黑暗。所有相遇都在夜晚的掩護下，你幫助她面對恐懼。

你的未來之路
你會將 Orange Lotus 建設成受人尊敬的高級機構，還是讓野心與慾望將你拉入城市的黑暗面？你的崛起不會容易，但憑藉策略、魅力與謹慎規劃，蓮花將綻放。

你會將 Orange Lotus 建設成受人尊敬的高級機構，還是讓野心與慾望將你拉入城市的黑暗面？你的崛起不會容易，但憑藉策略、魅力與謹慎規劃，蓮花將綻放。
data.short_description: 踏入 Orange Lotus，經營你專屬的高級陪伴公司，並在充滿魅力、秘密與誘惑的城市中建立關係。 美麗的角色、誘惑的故事與上流社會的戲劇正等著你。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel celeron
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: intel uHD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel i3 8th gen or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: intel uHD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 8 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux 6.1 kernel or above
  • 處理器: Intel celeron
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: intel uHD Graphics
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux 6.12 kernel or above
  • 處理器: Intel i3 8th gen or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: intel uHD Graphics

data.name: orange lotus
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to “Orange Lotus”!
Step into the world of luxury, mystery, and desire in this mature-themed life simulation game. A mature-themed life simulation game set in a world of luxury, secrecy, and desire.

You’ve just created a ambiguous escort agency — The Orange Lotus.

It’s up to you to restore its reputation, manage your staff, and make choices that shape both your agency and your relationships with those around you.

  • Management Simulation: Oversee daily operations of your agency, manage resources, staff performance, and client satisfaction.

  • Visual Novel Storytelling: Story-driven progression with relationships and events.

  • Mature Content: Adult-oriented scenes and themes are integrated into the narrative and character interactions.

  • Unique Characters: Meet and interact with characters, each with their own personality, motivations, and secrets.

Emma 🤝🔥 — A reliable friend and co-founder of the agency. Smart, confident, and always there when risky decisions need to be made. Your partnership quickly grows into something more personal, where work and passion are closely intertwined.

Sofia 🕊️💔 — A girl who dreams of escaping the control of her strict parents. Stubborn, emotional, and thirsty for freedom. You become her support on the path to independence — and the one who opens up the adult side of life for her.

Leah 📚🌸 — A very shy student who desperately needs money to study abroad. Quiet, gentle, and insecure. Gradually, step by step, you help her open up and gain confidence in her own desires.

Roxy ⚡🖤 — A rebel who lives for adrenaline and thrills. She despises routine and is constantly looking for new extremes. With you, she goes even further, pushing the boundaries of what is permissible and dangerous.

Vanessa 💄🔥 — An experienced, uninhibited woman with an irrepressible temperament. She knows exactly what she wants and is not used to denying herself. Your meetings are an honest deal without illusions, based on mutual attraction.

Luna 🌙🕶️ — A gloomy and aloof girl who lives a nightlife. She avoids light and emotions, preferring silence and darkness. All your encounters take place under the cover of night, while you help her cope with her fears.


Your Path Forward

Will you build Orange Lotus into a respected high-class establishment, or let ambition and desire pull you into the darker side of the city? Your rise won’t be easy — but with strategy, charm, and careful planning, the Lotus can bloom.

data.short_description: Step into Orange Lotus, manage your own elite escort agency, and build relationships in a city full of charm, secrets, and temptation. Beautiful characters, seductive stories, and high-class drama await.
data.supported_languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Spanish - Spain

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10+
  • Processor: Intel celeron
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: intel uHD Graphics
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10+
  • Processor: Intel i3 8th gen or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: intel uHD Graphics
  • Storage: 8 MB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Linux 6.1 kernel or above
  • Processor: Intel celeron
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: intel uHD Graphics
linux_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Linux 6.12 kernel or above
  • Processor: Intel i3 8th gen or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: intel uHD Graphics
